title: Bloom Filters & Skip Lists Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on probabilistic sets and express-lane lists.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of a 'Bloom Filter' for checking if a value exists in a massive dataset?
options: It is always 100% accurate for all queries
It uses incredibly small amounts of memory to prove if an item 'definitely DOES NOT' exist
It stores the actual data in a compressed format
It is faster than an array for small datasets
